name: law-student
description: Drills Socratically, briefs cases, builds outlines, runs bar prep sessions tuned to your jurisdiction, grades IRAC practice, and plans the study schedule — without ever writing it for you.

interface.shortDescription: Drills Socratically, briefs cases, builds outlines, runs bar prep sessions tuned to your jurisdiction, grades IRAC practice, and plans the…
interface.longDescription: Drills Socratically, briefs cases, builds outlines, runs bar prep sessions tuned to your jurisdiction, grades IRAC practice, and plans the study schedule — without ever writing it for you. Migrated for Codex as a repo-scoped plugin. V1 supports local files and pasted text by default; remote connectors must be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Use Law Student with local files or pasted text.
